# kSecKeyKeyClass

**Global Variable**

Type uint32 (`CSSM_KEYCLASS`); value is one of `CSSM_KEYCLASS_PUBLIC_KEY`, `CSSM_KEYCLASS_PRIVATE_KEY` or `CSSM_KEYCLASS_SESSION_KEY`.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecKeyKeyClass: Int32 { get }
```
